title: pelargonium × exquisitum
intro: Pelargonium × exquisitum, also known as the Exquisite Pelargonium, is a hybrid species of the pelargonium genus, which is a group of flowering plants in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are found in its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Pelargonium × exquisitum include soothing digestive issues, relieving coughs and colds, and reducing stress and anxiety. The plant is commonly prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
